subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-24 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: Perfection is impossible without humility; humility is unattainable without the love of God
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @loving community spirit in teaching the Cause, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
